creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port does not build:

cc  -O -Wall -pedantic -DBSDPOSIX_STDC -c portsrv.c -o portsrv.o
--- doc/cmds.doc ---
LANG=C nroff -Tascii doc/cmds.macros.nr doc/cmds.nr > doc/cmds.doc
sh: nroff: not found
*** [doc/cmds.doc] Error code 127

make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jove/work/jove-4.17.0.5
1 error

make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/jove/work/jove-4.17.0.5
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Would you mind checking this?

Thanks!
